login.title: Ingia
login.description: Karibu tena kwenye jukwaa! Tafadhali ingiza maelezo yako.
login.error_unexpected: Hitilafu isiyotarajiwa imetokea. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

signup.title: Jisajili
signup.description: Tusaidie kukutambua wewe ni nani ndani ya mfumo wa usimamizi wa utafiti na uvumbuzi.
signup.password_hint: Angalau herufi 8, namba 1, na herufi 1 maalum
signup.error_unexpected: Hitilafu isiyotarajiwa imetokea. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

validation.email_invalid: Tafadhali ingiza anwani ya barua pepe halali
validation.password_minLength: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi 8
validation.password_uppercase: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi moja kubwa
validation.password_lowercase: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi moja ndogo
validation.password_number: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau namba moja
validation.password_special: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi moja maalum
validation.fullname_min: Jina kamili lazima liwe na angalau herufi 2
validation.agree_to_terms: Lazima ukubaliane na Sera ya Faragha na Masharti na Vigezo

verify_email.verifying_desc: Tafadhali subiri tunapothibitisha anwani yako ya barua pepe...
verify_email.success_desc: Akaunti yako sasa inafanya kazi. Tunakuelekeza kwenye ukurasa wa kuingia baada ya sekunde {{count}}...
verify_email.failed_desc: Kiungo cha uthibitishaji si halali au muda wake umeisha.
verify_email.failed_link_invalid: Kiungo cha uthibitishaji kilikuwa si halali au tayari kimeshatumika. Ikiwa utaendelea kupata matatizo, tafadhali jaribu kuingia.
verify_email.confirm_sent_to: Tumekutumia barua pepe kwenda {{email}} ikiwa na kiungo cha siri cha kuthibitisha akaunti yako.
verify_email.confirm_no_email: Ikiwa hujaona barua pepe ndani ya dakika 5, tafadhali wasiliana nasi kupitia support@sfa.com
verify_email.resend_countdown: Tuma tena kiungo baada ya sekunde {{count}}
verify_email.resend_button: Tuma tena barua pepe ya uthibitishaji
verify_email.resend_success: Barua pepe ya uthibitishaji imetumwa tena kwa mafanikio!
verify_email.resend_error: Imeshindwa kutuma tena barua pepe. Tafadhali jaribu baadaye.
verify_email.already_verified: Akaunti yako tayari imethibitishwa! Tafadhali ingia.

forgot_password.title: Umesahau nenosiri?
forgot_password.description: Ingiza anwani yako ya barua pepe au jina la mtumiaji na tutakutumia kiungo cha kuweka upya nenosiri lako.
forgot_password.success_description: Tumetuma kiungo cha kuweka upya nenosiri kwenda {{email}}
forgot_password.success_no_email: Hujaona barua pepe? Angalia folda ya barua pepe zisizohitajika (spam) au

reset_password.title: Weka nenosiri jipya
reset_password.description: Nenosiri lako jipya lazima liwe tofauti na manenosiri uliyotumia hapo awali.
reset_password.success_description: Nenosiri lako limewekwa upya kwa mafanikio. Bofya hapa chini ili kuingia.

otp.verify_desc: Tumetuma namba ya uthibitishaji ya tarakimu 6 kwenda
otp.invalid_error: Namba ya uthibitishaji si halali au muda wake umeisha.
otp.resend_error: Haikuweza kutuma tena namba. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
otp.resend_failed: Hitilafu ya mtandao wakati wa kutuma tena namba.
otp.verify_failed: Hitilafu ya mtandao wakati wa kuthibitisha namba.
